vp345PhysicalRlsPolicyAlignment.layer: VP-3.45 Physical Table RLS Policy Alignment and Rehearsal
invariants: policies use physical Prisma table names
RLS is enabled and forced on protected tables
audit ledger and runtime attempts remain append-only
ACCOUNTING has no global financial visibility
obsolete session-level context helpers are removed
apply and rollback rehearsal is restricted to explicitly named non-production databases
CI performs static verification only and modifies no database

vp346PersistentIdentitySourceOfTruth.layer: VP-3.46 Persistent Identity Session Revocation MFA and Tenant Source of Truth

readiness: 86% honest architectural readiness. VP-3.45 aligns and verifies RLS policy artifacts and non-production rehearsal controls. It does not apply RLS or migrations to production, complete persistent identity, expose a public runtime route, or confirm live bank, FGIS or EDO integrations.
